{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/4522799?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/dtrudg", "id": 4522799, "login": "dtrudg", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ1MjI3OTk=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/dtrudg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47215", "cvss": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Impact

The `limit container paths` directive in `singularity.conf` is intended to allow a system administrator limit the paths from which containers can be run, under setuid mode. Due to incorrect matching of a path string, sibling directories with similar names may incorrectly be allowed.

For example, the configuration:

```
limit container paths = /data/safe
```

Will also allow containers in `/data/safe-but-unsafe` to be run.


### Patches

This issue is patched in SingularityCE 4.4.2 and SingularityPRO 4.3.9 / 4.1.14

### Workarounds

If you do not use the `limit container paths` functionality, then this issue does not affect your installation.

If you do use the `limit container paths` functionality then you must update. Please also review the documented limitations when user namespaces are enabled [1].", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0001, "percentile": 0.01111}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wqcr-7rf3-f64m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T17:38:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wqcr-7rf3-f64m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wqcr-7rf3-f64m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47215"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-04T17:38:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/sylabs/singularity/security/advisories/GHSA-wqcr-7rf3-f64m", "https://github.com/sylabs/singularity/commit/c08791793e843d4c9c1f2fc1d9d12abef747378f", "https://docs.sylabs.io/guides/latest/admin-guide/configfiles.html#limiting-container-execution", "https://github.com/sylabs/singularity/releases/tag/v4.4.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wqcr-7rf3-f64m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sylabs/singularity/security-advisories/GHSA-wqcr-7rf3-f64m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sylabs/singularity", "summary": "Singluarity: Incorrect path matching for 'limit container paths' directive", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T17:38:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wqcr-7rf3-f64m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/sylabs/singularity/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.4.2"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/sylabs/singularity"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Singluarity: Incorrect path matching for 'limit container paths' directive
